chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3012 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on statement as flagged. 26.02.2019 Mr. Mangal Menghwar, Advocate for petitioners -.-.-. Learned Counsel submits that he under the instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
